current.featured1_description: Chair comes with a delivery datepicker on the cart page, this way your customers can choose a day for their delivery. Nice!
current.featured2_description: Take control over your shopify store and your business. Chair comes with ajax powered cart wich makes your store extremely intuitive and easy to use.

current.slide_1_description: Chair comes with 3 types of layout: grid, list and full width. You can use any of them on both home page and catalog.
current.slide_2_description: You can use a banner or slider for home page, any of them are easy to edit, change or show off.
